sentences.target: Mein Onkel arbeitet in der Landwirtschaft.

translations.de: Mein Onkel arbeitet in der Landwirtschaft.
translations.es: Mi tío trabaja en la agricultura.
translations.ru: Мой дядя работает в сельском хозяйстве.
translations.vi: Chú tôi làm trong ngành nông nghiệp.
translations.nl: Mijn oom werkt in de landbouw.
translations.uk: Мій дядько працює в сільському господарстві.
translations.hi: मेरे चाचा कृषि में काम करते हैं।
translations.el: Ο θείος μου δουλεύει στη γεωργία.
translations.id: Paman saya bekerja di bidang pertanian.
translations.ja: おじは農業の仕事をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner marking ownership; agrees with the head noun (masculine singular, nominative) 'Onkel'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; predicates the action.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces a PP indicating the field/sphere.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Landwirtschaft'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'in' (static location/sector).

sentences.target: Ich studiere Landwirtschaft an der Hochschule.

translations.de: Ich studiere Landwirtschaft an der Hochschule.
translations.en: I study agriculture at the university.
translations.ru: Я изучаю сельское хозяйство в университете.
translations.vi: Tôi học nông nghiệp ở trường đại học.
translations.nl: Ik studeer landbouw aan de universiteit.
translations.uk: Я вивчаю сільське господарство в університеті.
translations.hi: मैं विश्वविद्यालय में कृषि की पढ़ाई करता हूँ।
translations.ja: 大学で農学を勉強しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; takes a direct object (field of study).
Common noun, feminine singular; bare accusative direct object indicating the subject studied.
Preposition selecting dative for static location; introduces the institution where the studying occurs.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Hochschule'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of 'an', denotes the educational institution.

sentences.target: Die Landwirtschaft leidet unter der Trockenheit.

translations.de: Die Landwirtschaft leidet unter der Trockenheit.
translations.es: La agricultura sufre por la sequía.
translations.ko: 가뭄 때문에 농업이 어려움을 겪고 있어요.
translations.pt: A agricultura sofre com a seca.
translations.vi: Nông nghiệp bị ảnh hưởng bởi hạn hán.
translations.nl: De landbouw lijdt onder de droogte.
translations.el: Η γεωργία υποφέρει από την ξηρασία.
translations.ja: 農業は干ばつに苦しんでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner for the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite intransitive verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; subcategorizes a PP with 'unter'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the source/cause of adversity.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Trockenheit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'unter'.

sentences.target: Meine Oma erzählt von der Landwirtschaft von früher.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma ɛʁˈtsɛːlt fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈlantvɪʁtʃaft fɔn ˈfʁyːɐ̯/

translations.de: Meine Oma erzählt von der Landwirtschaft von früher.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈoːma ɛʁˈtsɛːlt fɔn deːɐ̯ ˈlantvɪʁtʃaft fɔn ˈfʁyːɐ̯/
translations.en: My grandma talks about agriculture in the past.
translations.es: Mi abuela cuenta cómo era la agricultura antes.
translations.fr: Ma grand-mère parle de l'agriculture d'autrefois.
translations.it: Mia nonna racconta com'era l'agricoltura una volta.
translations.ko: 우리 할머니는 예전의 농업에 대해 이야기해요.
translations.ru: Моя бабушка рассказывает, каким было сельское хозяйство раньше.
translations.pt: Minha avó conta como era a agricultura antigamente.
translations.he: סבתא שלי מספרת איך החקלאות הייתה פעם.
translations.tr: Büyükannem eskiden tarımın nasıl olduğunu anlatıyor.
translations.vi: Bà tôi kể về nông nghiệp ngày xưa.
translations.ar: جدتي تتحدث عن الزراعة في الماضي.
translations.nl: Mijn oma vertelt over de landbouw van vroeger.
translations.uk: Моя бабуся розповідає, яким було сільське господарство раніше.
translations.hu: A nagymamám mesél a régi mezőgazdaságról.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी पहले की कृषि के बारे में बताती हैं।
translations.pl: Moja babcia opowiada, jakie było kiedyś rolnictwo.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου μιλάει για τη γεωργία όπως ήταν παλιά.
translations.nb: Bestemor forteller om hvordan landbruket var før.
translations.id: Nenek saya bercerita tentang pertanian zaman dulu.
translations.sv: Min mormor berättar om hur jordbruket var förr.
translations.ro: Bunica mea povestește despre cum era agricultura pe vremuri.
translations.cs: Moje babička vypráví o tom, jaké bylo dřív zemědělství.
translations.da: Min mormor fortæller om, hvordan landbruget var før.
translations.fi: Isoäitini kertoo, millaista maatalous oli ennen.
translations.ja: 祖母は昔の農業について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies the subject noun 'Oma'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular, present indicative; introduces content via a 'von'-PP.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces the topic 'Landwirtschaft'.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; agrees with 'Landwirtschaft'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'von'.
Preposition introducing a temporal PP; indicates origin in time ('from earlier').
Temporal adverb meaning 'earlier/formerly'; complements 'von' in the PP 'von früher'.

en: I study agriculture at the university.
My grandma talks about agriculture in the past.
